policy: Only safe, topology-preserving tiers are emitted. Identical medium/low copies are forbidden.

low.omissionReason: No shared-boundary-aware simplifier is approved for ADM3 neighbourhoods yet.
low.requiredBeforeEmission: Implement and test shared-boundary-aware simplification that preserves topology and parent/neighbor semantics.

medium.omissionReason: No shared-boundary-aware simplifier is approved for ADM3 neighbourhoods yet.
medium.requiredBeforeEmission: Implement and test shared-boundary-aware simplification that preserves topology and parent/neighbor semantics.
